name: Fetch Bing WallpapersDaily on: schedule: - cron: '0 0 * * *' # Запуск каждый день в 00:00 UTC workflow_dispatch: # Позволит запускать вручную кнопкой jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout repository uses: actions/checkout@v3 - name: Set up Python uses: actions/setup-python@v4 with: python-version: '3.x' - name: Install dependencies run: pip install requests - name: Run script run: python fetch_bing.py - name: Commit and push changes run: | git config --global user.name "BingBot" git config --global user.email "bot@github.com" git add data.json git commit -m "Update wallpapers data" || exit 0 git push
